core_concept: 一個被刪除的恐怖故事頁面，充滿陰森與遺忘的氣息
composition_hint: 以螢幕為視覺焦點，將塵埃與靜電紋理融入背景，強調遺忘與腐朽的氛圍
potential_subjects: A flickering computer screen showing a blank webpage
A dusty keyboard with smudged fingerprints
A broken monitor emitting a faint blue glow
